messages.subject: [OGRUG] R-UG-Ottawa Digest, Vol 18, Issue 1
messages.body_plain:
The posts below are inappropriate to a local geographic list and as admin I have
unsubscribed the poster.

JN


On 12/03/2011 06:00 AM, r-ug-ottawa-request at r-project.org wrote:
> Send R-UG-Ottawa mailing list submissions to
> 	r-ug-ottawa at r-project.org
> 
> To subscribe or unsubscribe via the World Wide Web, visit
> 	https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/r-ug-ottawa
> or, via email, send a message with subject or body 'help' to
> 	r-ug-ottawa-request at r-project.org
> 
> You can reach the person managing the list at
> 	r-ug-ottawa-owner at r-project.org
> 
> When replying, please edit your Subject line so it is more specific
> than "Re: Contents of R-UG-Ottawa digest..."
> 
> 
> Today's Topics:
> 
>    1. Problem in GenMatch (shyam basnet)
>    2. Error in GenMatch (shyam basnet)
> 
> 
> ----------------------------------------------------------------------
> 
> Message: 1
> Date: Fri, 2 Dec 2011 03:44:37 -0800 (PST)
> From: shyam basnet <shyamabc2002 at yahoo.com>
> To: "r-ug-ottawa at r-project.org" <r-ug-ottawa at r-project.org>
> Subject: [OGRUG] Problem in GenMatch
> Message-ID:
> 	<1322826277.25386.YahooMailNeo at web161701.mail.bf1.yahoo.com>
> Content-Type: text/plain
> 
> Dear R Users,
> 
> I am a novice learner of R software. I am working with Genetic Matching - GenMatch(), but I am getting an Error message as follows: 
> 
> Error in GenMatch(Tr = Tr, X = X.binarynp, BalanceMatrix = BalanceMatrix.binarynp,  : 
>   GenMatch(): input includes NAs
> 
> Could you please suggest me correcting the above problem?
> 
> My GenMatch command is,
> 
>> gen1 <- GenMatch(Tr = Tr, X = X.binarynp, BalanceMatrix = BalanceMatrix.binarynp, popsize = 1000)
> 
> Thanking you,
> 
> Sincerely Yours,
> 
> Shyam Kumar Basnet
> SLU, Uppsala
> Sweden
> 	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
> 
> 
> 
> ------------------------------
> 
> Message: 2
> Date: Fri, 2 Dec 2011 03:51:00 -0800 (PST)
> From: shyam basnet <shyamabc2002 at yahoo.com>
> To: "r-ug-ottawa at r-project.org" <r-ug-ottawa at r-project.org>
> Subject: [OGRUG] Error in GenMatch
> Message-ID:
> 	<1322826660.68824.YahooMailNeo at web161702.mail.bf1.yahoo.com>
> Content-Type: text/plain
> 
> Dear R Users,
> 
> I am a novice learner of R software. I am working with Genetic Matching - GenMatch(), but I am getting an Error message as follows: 
> 
> Error in GenMatch(Tr = Tr, X = X.binarynp, BalanceMatrix = BalanceMatrix.binarynp,  : 
>   GenMatch(): input includes NAs
> 
> Could you please suggest me correcting the above problem?
> 
> My GenMatch command is,
> 
>> gen1 <- GenMatch(Tr = Tr, X = X.binarynp, BalanceMatrix = BalanceMatrix.binarynp, popsize = 1000)
> 
> Thanking you,
> 
> Sincerely Yours,
> 
> Shyam Kumar Basnet
> SLU, Uppsala
> Sweden 
> 
> 	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
> 
> 
> 
> ------------------------------
> 
> _______________________________________________
> R-UG-Ottawa mailing list
> R-UG-Ottawa at r-project.org

> End of R-UG-Ottawa Digest, Vol 18, Issue 1
